CONST_MineralExtractor.name: Mineral extractor
CONST_MineralExtractor.description: Drill based extraction and conditioning unit. Provides your asteroid with required minerals.

CONST_WaterExtractor.name: Water extractor
CONST_WaterExtractor.description: Laser based extraction unit. Provides your asteroid with required water.

CONST_SolarUnit.name: Solar unit
CONST_SolarUnit.description: Orbital solar station, beaming down power to your asteroid.

CONST_PlasmaCanon.name: Plasma canon
CONST_PlasmaCanon.description: Simple defense system focusing a high energy plasma burst on targets.

CONST_Shipyard.name: Shipyard
CONST_Shipyard.description: Allow production of cargo and military fleets.
